full_text:
Fa Zheng (Xiaozhi) 法正 (孝直)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fa Zheng (法正), styledXiaozhi (孝直), was born in Youfufeng. Served Liu Zhang then Liu Bei. Was integral to the foundation of Shu. Fa Zheng was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Fa Zheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
